info.title: Infinity API
info.description: The Infinity API allows you to interact with your Infinity workspaces, boards, items, and more. Build integrations to automate your project management workflows.

get.description: Retrieves current user profile data including fields not visible to others
Lists all workspaces for the logged-in user

post.description: Creates a new board in a workspace

get.description: Retrieves a single board by ID

post.description: Creates a new attribute for a board

get.description: Retrieves a single attribute by ID

delete.description: Deletes an attribute from a board

get.description: Lists paginated items in a board

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Expand related resources (values, values.attribute, folder, created_by)

post.description: Creates a new item in a board

get.description: Retrieves a single item by ID

put.description: Updates an existing item (archives instead of deletes as of v2025-12-01)

delete.description: Archives an item from a board

post.description: Creates a new comment on an item

get.description: Retrieves a single comment by ID

delete.description: Deletes a comment from an item

post.description: Creates a new folder in a board

get.description: Retrieves a single folder by ID

delete.description: Deletes a folder from a board

post.description: Uploads a file attachment to a workspace
Creates an attachment from a URL
Creates a new view for a board

get.description: Retrieves a single view by ID

delete.description: Deletes a view from a board

post.description: Invites a member to a workspace

put.description: Adds a member to a workspace

delete.description: Removes a member from a workspace

post.description: Creates a new webhook for a board

delete.description: Deletes a webhook from a board

bearerAuth.description: Bearer authentication using API key. All requests must include `Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}` and `X-API-Version: 2025-12-01.morava` headers.

After.name: after
After.description: Cursor for pagination (items after this cursor)

Before.name: before
Before.description: Cursor for pagination (items before this cursor)

user_ids.description: User IDs to add to the board
